## What changed?

## How to test
- [ ] `pytest -q`

## Documentation (required when logic changes)
- [ ] Updated `MODEL_CARD.md` (if model behavior/inputs/metrics changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/design.md` (if rules/features/architecture changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/labeling.md` (if target/label definition changed)
- [ ] Updated `docs/evaluation.md` (if thresholds/metrics changed)

## Governance
- [ ] No secrets/data committed
- [ ] Decision record schema still valid
- [ ] Replay test passes
